tests.name: webview/graph/rendering/surface/fallbackBoundary renders children while no surface error has occurred
webview/graph/rendering/surface/fallbackBoundary renders the fallback and reports errors
webview/graph/rendering/surface/fallbackBoundary resets the boundary when the reset key changes
graph view webview message listener stores user group updates from primary dispatch flows
graph view webview message listener recomputes and sends groups after storing user group updates
graph view webview message listener stores filter pattern updates from primary dispatch flows
graph view webview message listener does not reanalyze the graph for unrelated settings updates
graph view webview message listener stores ready state updates from plugin dispatch flows
graph view webview message listener ignores duplicate WEBVIEW_READY messages from the same listener
graph view webview message listener replaces the previous listener when the same webview is wired again
graph view webview message listener does not store ready state for handled plugin messages without a ready flag
graph view webview message listener ignores messages not handled by the primary or plugin dispatchers
graph view command message shows the undo description when one exists
graph view command message shows an empty-undo message when there is nothing to undo
graph view command message shows the redo description when one exists
graph view command message shows an empty-redo message when there is nothing to redo
graph view command message changes the depth limit
graph view command message updates depth mode
graph view command message updates dag mode
graph view command message updates node size mode
graph view command message opens the graph in the editor when requested
graph view command message returns false for unrelated messages
graph view ready message sends the initial webview payloads and notifies readiness
graph view ready message sends available views before kicking off analysis
graph view ready message waits for workspace readiness during the first workspace-backed analysis
graph view ready message skips workspace readiness waiting outside the initial workspace pass
graph view ready message does not notify readiness twice
graph view ready message waits for cached timeline replay before notifying readiness
graph view legend message persists updated legends without transient webview fields
graph view legend message returns false for unrelated messages
graph view legend message persists plugin-default visibility overrides and resends groups
graph view legend message persists legend ordering and resends groups
graph view physics message sends current physics settings on request
graph view physics message updates a single physics setting
graph view physics message resets physics settings to defaults
graph view physics message returns false for unrelated messages
graph view export message routes png export payloads to the png saver
graph view export message routes svg export payloads to the svg saver
graph view export message routes markdown export payloads to the markdown saver
graph view export message routes jpeg export payloads to the jpeg saver
graph view export message routes json export payloads to the json saver
graph view export message routes symbol export requests to the symbol saver
graph view export message returns false for non-export messages
graph view timeline message awaits commit jumps
graph view timeline message awaits timeline resets
graph view timeline message starts file previews at a commit without blocking the caller
graph view timeline message starts repository indexing without blocking the caller
graph view timeline message returns false for unrelated messages
graph/surfaceError posts the 3d unavailable message and falls back to 2d
graph/interaction surface click opens the background context menu for mac control-click
graph/interaction surface click clears the selection on a normal background click
graph/interaction surface click treats ctrl-click as a normal background click on non-mac platforms
graph/interaction surface click opens the edge context menu for mac control-click
graph/interaction surface click ignores normal link clicks
graph/interaction surface click ignores ctrl-click link clicks on non-mac platforms
